story: G015 cached PI_DEBUG_REDRAW + carried line-width metadata

details.scenario: Unset PI_DEBUG_REDRAW across diff, viewport repaint, full render, and multiplexer resize paths
details.expectedBehavior: At most construction-time env read and no debug append writes
Debug append counter and captured log content are non-empty
writes:
[2026-07-17T07:22:55.913Z] fullRender: terminal width changed (-1 -> 20) (prev=0, new=2, height=4)
[2026-07-17T07:22:55.941Z] fullRender: terminal width changed (-1 -> 20) (prev=0, new=2, height=4)

details.expectedBehavior: Differential guard uses carried widths and performs zero fallback visibleWidth calls

details.scenario: Changed over-width line is normalized, cached, then checked by the differential truncation guard
details.expectedBehavior: Carried width avoids fallback measurement while the viewport still contains correctly truncated width-12 content

details.scenario: Legacy full normalization reference vs default cached/viewport path for append, wide line, resize
details.expectedBehavior: Viewport and terminal write bytes match exactly

details.scenario: Default tab width changes after a cached line containing a tab has been rendered
details.expectedBehavior: TUI cache invalidates and re-renders with truncation appropriate to the new tab width

details.scenario: Family ZWJ cluster lands exactly at and one cell beyond the terminal boundary
details.expectedBehavior: The normalization hot path uses Bun/terminal cluster width and does not prematurely truncate the exact-boundary line

contractCoverage.obligation: PI_DEBUG_REDRAW is cached at construction; frame paths do not re-read env and do not write debug logs when disabled.
PI_DEBUG_REDRAW enabled still emits redraw debug logs with content.
Differential/repaint truncation guard reuses carried widths for normalized cached lines and only measures uncached lines.
Over-width lines are still correctly truncated, including after width/tab-width changes that invalidate cached width metadata.
Render output remains byte-identical to reference output across append, wide-line, and resize scenarios.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: TUI render frames with PI_DEBUG_REDRAW unset
TUI render with PI_DEBUG_REDRAW=1 and appendFileSync spy
Differential render of cached wide lines using TUI render counters
Virtual terminal viewport inspection for uncached over-width and tab-width changed lines
